mnemonics: WUMPUS: Walls, Under, Pit, Mouse, Stench
KNOWLEDGE-BASED AGENTS:  Know what you want to achieve,  Know the environment
keyPoints: Definition of Logical Agent:  An agent that uses knowledge to make decisions
The Wumpus World:  A classic problem in AI,  A 5x5 grid with obstacles and rewards
Propositional Logic:  A branch of logic that deals with true or false statements
Reasoning Patterns in Propositional Logic:  De Morgan's Laws,  Distributive Law
